---
title: "Residualsun"
subtitle: "Less is more"
image: "img/profile.gif"
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 15em
  image-shape: rounded
  id: hero-heading
  # links:
  #  - icon: twitter
  #    text: Twitter
  #    href: https://twitter.com/Residualsun1
  #  - icon: github
  #    text: Github
  #    href: https://github.com/residualsun1
# toc-location: right
listing: 
- id: blog
  contents: 
    - "../blog/*/**/index.qmd"
  sort: date desc
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 1
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, subtitle, image]
  max-items: 1
  image-height: "200"
- id: reading
  contents: 
    - "../lifestream/*/**/index.qmd"
  sort: date desc
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 1
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, image]
  max-items: 1
  image-height: "200"
- id: english-writing
  contents: 
    - "../literatures/*/**/index.qmd"
  sort: date desc
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 1
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, subtitle, image]
  max-items: 1
  image-height: "200"
- id: r
  contents: 
    - "../r/*/**/index.qmd"
    - "../r/*/**/index.markdown"
  sort: date desc
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 1
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, image]
  max-items: 1
  image-height: "200"
format: 
  html: 
    page-layout: full
comments: false

header-includes: >
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/about.css">
resources:
  - ../assets/about.css
---

<!--改成单语
<center>

::: {.btn-group role="group" aria-label="About"}
<a href="about.html"> <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary me-md-2 btn-sm">中文</button></a> <a href="about-en.html"> <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary me-md-2 btn-sm">English</button></a>
:::

</center>
-->

::: {#hero-heading}
<!--
::: h2
<center>关于我</center>
:::
-->

Hello, I am Guozheng Huang, an ordinary junior student who likes to listen to Jay Chou and MY LITTLE AIRPORT when I am idle, Linkin Park when I am depressed, and Leslie Cheung when I am nostalgic.

Recently, I've been listening to my little airport, and *It's Raining for Two Days* always reminds me of a passage written by Liu Yisheng:

> "Rusty feelings again on a rainy day, thoughts playing hide-and-seek in smoke rings."

*Tears of SABINA*, *Summer Vacation Back to Middle School*, *Sad Whoremonger*, *The Year of Walking*, *Every Time You Go*, *For Telling It Like It Is*, and *Then the Formation Didn't Know It* are all very good, and are in my favorite style; in the words of Lechi, they all seem to be woozy.

:::

## About this blog

::: grid
::: {#about-me .g-col-6}
This site is my English blog. It is also my second blog, which is used to practice my English writing. The first blog is my starting point in the blogosphere. 

The following are blogs that I read often, they all gave some energy to me.

<ul class="fa-ul">

<li><i class="fa-solid fa-certificate"></i>[谢益辉](https://yihui.org)：A man who influences many R learner, including me into blogging!</li>

<li><i class="fa-solid fa-graduation-cap"></i>[叶寻](https://cyrusyip.org)：Good computer skills and willingness to help others</li>

</ul>
:::

::: {#about-me .g-col-6}

<ul class="fa-ul">

<li><i class="fa-solid fa-graduation-cap"></i>[列弛](https://www.liechi.org)：The first friend to leave me a message, a friend who keeps reading and reflecting</li>

<li><i class="fa-solid fa-graduation-cap"></i>[袁凡](https://yuanfan.rbind.io)：A girl who regards herself as salarywoman while keeps up with her studies and is learning R as well as reading. I admire her a lot</li>

<li><i class="fa-solid fa-graduation-cap"></i>[进击的鱼子酱](https://dylanyu233.rbind.io)：My lifelong friend</li>

<li><i class="fa-solid fa-graduation-cap"></i>[心的道理](https://stephenleng.com/)：Good at observing and criticizing social phenomena</li>

<li><i class="fa-solid fa-graduation-cap"></i>[太隐](https://wangyurui.com/)：Exquisite blog, keep learning.</li>

</ul>
:::
:::

<!-- end grid -->

## Lately……

::: grid

::: {#lately .g-col-3}
#### Blog

::: {#blog}
:::

[All →](../blog){.about-links .subtitle}
:::

::: {#lately .g-col-3}
#### Lifestream

::: {#lifestream}
:::

[All →](../lifestream){.about-links .subtitle}
:::

::: {#lately .g-col-3}
#### Literatures

::: {#literatures}
:::

[All →](../literatures){.about-links .subtitle}
:::

::: {#lately .g-col-3}
#### R

::: {#r}
:::

[All →](../r){.about-links .subtitle}
:::
:::
